problem_solved: Critically ill or injured patients in rural or remote areas cannot access specialized care quickly enough through ground transportation alone
solution_description: Air medical transport leader with 35+ years experience providing helicopter and fixed-wing emergency medical services. 4,500+ team members including critical care clinicians specializing in burns, cardiac, pediatrics, respiratory, and trauma. Partners with EMS and hospitals for patient logistics solutions
traction_signals: Multiple bases including LifeNet, MediFlight, AirLife brands
notes: Market leader in US air ambulance. Strong clinical capabilities with specialized crews. Working on affordability/membership alternatives. Medium Varden fit - infrastructure service rather than software platform.
